channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Senator John Cornyn becomes latest Republican to lose seat after public rift with President Trump
item.description: "John Cornyn is a good man, and I worked well with him, but he was not supportive of me when times were tough," Trump wrote on social media.

item.title: LEGO Foundation donates $97 million to bring play-based learning to over 5 million children in conflict zones
item.description: The partnership with the International Rescue Committee is expected to reach over five million children in conflict zones over the next five years.

item.title: Inside CEO Jane Fraser's five-year effort to restore Citi's credibility
item.description: Also includes all the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: Five major hyperscalers and Nvidia share a notable trait: female CFOs
item.description: How women rose to top finance roles at a pivotal time for AI investment.
